/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/intel-8080-emulator-cpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/intel-8080-emulator-cpp.dir/src/CPU.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/intel-8080-emulator-cpp.dir/src/Display.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/intel-8080-emulator-cpp.dir/src/Emulator.cpp.o" -o intel-8080-emulator-cpp  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/joekenyon/Desktop/intel-8080-emulator-cpp/build/_deps/sdl2-build _deps/sdl2-build/libSDL2-2.0d.0.dylib
